About the collective

Founded in 2025, the association Collecti'Frog is a joyful collective born somewhere between two lily pads, croaking with creative ideas.

Scenography, VJing, lighting and other hybrid techniques — we put our paws to work crafting events and support other organisations in their artistic and technical adventures, with enthusiasm and a touch of freshness.

Visit collecti-frog.fr → Back to flasher
